hypothesis: If a single-agent pipeline combining structured PDF-to-markdown conversion with vision-language model image processing and a large language model for extraction is applied to scientific chemical information extraction, then it will achieve competitive or superior precision, recall, and F1 scores compared to multi-agent domain-specific systems and general-purpose agents, because preserving document structure and integrating multimodal content within a streamlined workflow reduces information loss and coordination overhead inherent in complex multi-agent architectures.
